langchainEditor.toolRateLimitsDesc: Override default rate for specific tools
langchainEditor.retryDesc: Configure automatic retries with exponential backoff.

welcome.title: Welcome to EDDI
welcome.subtitle: Your AI Agent Command Center
welcome.introText: EDDI Manager is your command center for building, testing, and operating conversational AI agents.
welcome.buildAgentsDesc: Create and configure AI agents with the wizard or from scratch
welcome.designWorkflowsDesc: Drag-and-drop pipeline builder with behavior rules, LLM chains, and tools
welcome.testRealtimeDesc: Chat with your agents with streaming responses and built-in debugging
welcome.monitorOperateDesc: Conversations, audit trails, secrets, and quotas — all in one place
welcome.readySubtitle: You can restart any tour from the sidebar Help menu
welcome.capabilitiesSubtitle: كل ما تحتاجه لبناء وكلاء ذكاء اصطناعي جاهزين للإنتاج

dashboard.title: Dashboard Tour
dashboard.step1Desc: The sidebar organizes everything into three zones: Management, Development, and Operations. You'll always know where to find things.
dashboard.step2Desc: Live counts of your agents, workflows, and conversations. Click any card to jump straight to that section.
dashboard.step3Desc: Jump straight to common tasks. The Agent Wizard is the fastest way to create your first agent — it takes under 2 minutes.
dashboard.step4Desc: Switch between light, dark, and system themes. EDDI Manager speaks 11 languages — pick yours from the language selector.

agents.title: Agents Tour
agents.step1Desc: The wizard walks you through creating a fully configured agent — choose a model, set a personality, enable tools, and deploy.
agents.step2Desc: For power users: create a blank agent and configure it with full JSON control. Perfect for advanced setups.
agents.step3Desc: Find agents instantly by name. Switch between card and list views with the toggle on the right.
agents.step4Desc: Each card shows the agent's name, version, and last modified time. Click any agent for its detail page with deploy, chat, and workflow controls.

workflows.title: Workflows Tour
workflows.step1Desc: Workflows define the processing pipeline — a sequence of tasks like LLM calls, behavior rules, and HTTP integrations.
workflows.step2Desc: Each workflow can be attached to one or more agents. Click to open the drag-and-drop pipeline editor.
workflows.step3Desc: Search by name and switch between card grid and sortable table views.

chat.title: Chat Tour
chat.step1Desc: Select a deployed agent to start a conversation. Only agents that have been deployed appear here.
chat.step2Desc: Toggle real-time token streaming. When enabled, the response appears word by word — great for debugging latency.
chat.step3Desc: Open the sidebar to browse and resume previous conversations.
chat.step4Desc: Type a message and press Enter. The agent responds using the LLM, tools, and workflows you've configured.

resources.title: Resources Tour
resources.step1Desc: Resources are the building blocks of workflows. Each type controls a different part of the agent's behavior.
resources.step2Desc: Define which AI model powers your agent, its system prompt, tools, MCP servers, and cascade settings. This is the brain.
resources.step3Desc: Behavior Rules control conversation flow. HTTP Calls connect to external APIs. Both can be used as LLM tools.

conversations.title: Conversations Tour
conversations.step1Desc: Find conversations quickly by ID, agent, or recent user messages.
conversations.step2Desc: Filter conversations by state: Active, In Progress, Ended, or Error.
conversations.step3Desc: Browse all sessions. Click any conversation card to open the timeline and debug.

groups.title: Discussion Groups Tour
groups.step1Desc: Create an orchestration group to let multiple agents collaborate and debate.
groups.step2Desc: Search through your existing multi-agent clusters.
groups.step3Desc: Manage your collaborative environments, edit their policies, or delete stale groups.

logs.title: System Logs Tour
logs.step1Desc: Switch between a real-time stream of system logs and historical log search.
logs.step2Desc: Filter the incoming live stream by Agent or by critical Log Level.
logs.step3Desc: Download the current filtered logs as a text file for external analysis.

secrets.title: Secrets Vault Tour
secrets.step1Desc: Securely store a new API key, token, or password that your agents can reference.
secrets.step2Desc: Filter the vault view to show secrets scoped to a specific tenant ID.
secrets.step3Desc: Learn how to dynamically inject secrets into your LLM configurations without hardcoding them.

audit.title: Audit Ledger Tour
audit.step1Desc: Search the immutable audit ledger by a specific Conversation ID or by an Agent version.
audit.step2Desc: Enter your ID and click search to pull the verifiable execution history.
audit.step3Desc: Export the retrieved audit records to JSON for compliance and reporting.

schedules.title: Schedules Tour
schedules.step1Desc: Set up a new cron job or continuous heartbeat to trigger agent workflows automatically.
schedules.step2Desc: Monitor the total, active, and failed schedules across your platform.
schedules.step3Desc: Manage your automated triggers natively: pause, resume, edit, or test-fire them.

quotas.title: Quotas Tour
quotas.step1Desc: Define hard limits on total agents, daily conversations, and token costs for this tenant.
quotas.step2Desc: Monitor how much of the allocated quota the tenant has consumed in real-time.
quotas.step3Desc: Save your adjusted limits. The platform will block traffic that breaches these ceilings.

coordinator.title: Coordinator Tour
coordinator.step1Desc: View the heartbeat and event source connected to the backend coordinator system.
coordinator.step2Desc: Monitor real-time task queues and active job execution across your cluster.
coordinator.step3Desc: Inspect failed tasks and systematically discard or retry them to maintain system stability.

orphans.title: Orphans Tour
orphans.step1Desc: Start a platform scan to detect loose configs disconnected from any agent.
orphans.step2Desc: Optionally toggle to include historically soft-deleted records in the purge.
orphans.step3Desc: Review the scanner's report, select stale objects, and permanently purge to reclaim DB space.

createOrWizard.title: New {{type}}
createOrWizard.quickCreateDesc: Set a name and description, configure details later.
createOrWizard.guidedSetupDesc: Step-by-step wizard with LLM provider, prompts, and deployment.

groups.emptyDescription: تتيح المجموعات لعدة وكلاء التعاون في مناقشات منظمة.
